steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants a specific example of something municipalities provide. The notes mention many public services generally, but they name only one concrete service: water treatment.

steps.title: Select the service example
steps.content: Choice A gives Xochicoatlan's population, not a service. Choice B identifies Xochicoatlan as one of Hidalgo's municipalities, not what municipalities provide. Choice D mentions public services but does not provide a specific example. The remaining choice names water treatment as a municipal service. The answer is C.
